creator: netchild@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 251186
make the start script service jails ready

The attached patch make the oauth2-proxy start script service jails ready. This is a new feature in -current.

See also:
  https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/handbook/jails/#service-jails
  https://docs.freebsd.org/en/articles/rc-scripting/#rcng-service-jails
